positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical, and central composition featuring a fantastical fusion of elements: celestial constellations woven with blooming jungle flora, accented by geometric Art Deco filigree. The aesthetic is a blend of vintage tattoo flash and modern linocut printmaking. Utilize strong, clean black silhouettes contrasted sharply against a muted, distressed cream background. Key elements include crescent moons, stylized exotic birds (like hummingbirds or peacocks), and lush, overlapping foliage (ferns, tropical leaves). The composition must be bold, scalable, and highly graphic, designed for high-contrast apparel printing. Use dynamic negative space. Composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, viewed in cross-section, evoking an enchanted, mysterious mood. Studio lighting, high contrast, intricate detail, vector art quality.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, signature, grain, noise, low quality, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, photo, photorealistic, messy, cluttered, dirty
